sentence: 她检查了邮件中的拼写错误。
pinyin: Tā jiǎnchá le yóujiàn zhōng de pīnxiě cuòwù.
english: She checked the spelling errors in the email.

sentence: 走廊里暗黑一片，他赶紧打开了手电筒。
pinyin: Zǒuláng lǐ àn hēi yī piàn, tā gǎnjǐn dǎkāi le shǒudiàntǒng.
english: The hallway was pitch dark, so he quickly switched on his flashlight.

meaning: to supervise the manufacture of; to supervise the shooting of films; e
sentence: 这部电影由著名导演监制，质量有保证。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng yóu zhùmíng dǎoyǎn jiān zhì, zhìliàng yǒu bǎozhèng.
english: This film was executive produced by a renowned director, so the quality is guaranteed.

meaning: (idiom) so that's how it is; I see
sentence: 听了她的解释，我才明白，原来如此。
pinyin: Tīng le tā de jiěshì, wǒ cái míngbai, yuán lái rú cǐ.
english: After hearing her explanation, I finally understood — so that's how it is.

meaning: to return to one's original trade; to put (a business etc) under the a
sentence: 这类项目应归口到技术部门统一管理。
pinyin: Zhè lèi xiàngmù yīng guī kǒu dào jìshù bùmén tǒngyī guǎnlǐ.
english: This type of project should be put under the unified management of the technical department.
